# Article 5 - Synthetic EU AI Act Article 5

Effective date: 2026-08-02
Jurisdiction: EU

Providers And Deployers Of Ai Systems That Interact With Persons shall inform natural persons that they are interacting with an AI system; non-compliance may be subject to administrative fines up to EUR 15M.
Providers shall preserve evidence for Article 5 where necessary for competent authority review.
This fixture is deterministic and supports compliance pipeline evaluation.
